name: Marinated Turkey Breast
recipeIngredient: 14.5 oz. Natural goodness chicken broth (1 can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the turkey with cold water and pat dry.
2. Mix the broth, rosemary, thyme, and pepper in a large deep nonmetallic dish.
3. Add the turkey and turn to coat evenly.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours, turning the turkey occasionally.
5. Remove the turkey from the marinade and place the meat-side up on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
6. Insert a meat thermometer into the thickest part of the meat, not touching the bone.
7. Roast at 350°F until the thermometer reads 170°F, basting occasionally with marinade.
8. Begin checking doneness after 1 1/2 hours of roasting time.
9. Allow the turkey to stand for 10 minutes before slicing.
10. Serves 6-8 | Calories: 122 | Fat: 1 gram
